title: webauthn credential update: O(n) scan + deserialize per credential
description: File: src/webauthn.rs:auth_complete. After a successful authentication, the code loads ALL passkeys, calls update_credential on ALL of them, then for each one calls update_credential_bycred_id which re-loads ALL rows from the DB again to find the matching one. For n passkeys, this is O(n^2) deserializations. Since n is single-digit this won't matter in practice. ponytail-appropriate but noted.
close_reason: Acceptable: admin has 1-3 passkeys max, O(n) on n≤3 is fine
